mapper.select: SELECT ic.* FROM im_invite_code ic WHERE ic.code = #{code} AND ic.deleted = 0
SELECT ic.*, t.name as tenantName, t.status as tenantStatus FROM im_invite_code ic LEFT JOIN system_tenant t ON ic.tenant_id = t.id WHERE ic.code = #{code} AND ic.deleted = 0

SELECT t.id as tenantId, t.name as tenantName, COUNT(ic.id) as totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN ic.status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as enabledCount, SUM(CASE WHEN ic.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as disabledCount, SUM(CASE WHEN ic.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as expiredCount, SUM(CASE WHEN ic.status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as usedUpCount, SUM(CASE WHEN ic.type = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as registerCount, SUM(CASE WHEN ic.type = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as groupCount, SUM(CASE WHEN ic.type = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as channelCount FROM system_tenant t LEFT JOIN im_invite_code ic ON t.id = ic.tenant_id AND ic.deleted = 0 WHERE t.deleted = 0 GROUP BY t.id, t.name ORDER BY t.id

SELECT ic.*, t.name as tenantName, t.status as tenantStatus FROM im_invite_code ic LEFT JOIN system_tenant t ON ic.tenant_id = t.id WHERE ic.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND ic.deleted = 0 ORDER BY ic.create_time DESC

SELECT ic.*, t.name as tenantName, t.status as tenantStatus FROM im_invite_code ic LEFT JOIN system_tenant t ON ic.tenant_id = t.id WHERE ic.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND ic.type = #{type} AND ic.deleted = 0 ORDER BY ic.create_time DESC

SELECT ic.*, t.name as tenantName, t.status as tenantStatus FROM im_invite_code ic LEFT JOIN system_tenant t ON ic.tenant_id = t.id WHERE ic.status = 0 AND ic.deleted = 0 AND (ic.valid_start_time IS NULL OR ic.valid_start_time <= NOW()) AND (ic.valid_end_time IS NULL OR ic.valid_end_time >= NOW()) AND (ic.usage_limit IS NULL OR ic.used_count < ic.usage_limit) ORDER BY ic.create_time DESC

SELECT ic.*, t.name as tenantName, t.status as tenantStatus FROM im_invite_code ic LEFT JOIN system_tenant t ON ic.tenant_id = t.id WHERE ic.deleted = 0 AND ic.valid_end_time IS NOT NULL AND ic.valid_end_time < NOW() ORDER BY ic.valid_end_time ASC

SELECT ic.*, t.name as tenantName, t.status as tenantStatus FROM im_invite_code ic LEFT JOIN system_tenant t ON ic.tenant_id = t.id WHERE ic.deleted = 0 AND ic.usage_limit IS NOT NULL AND ic.used_count >= ic.usage_limit ORDER BY ic.update_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE im_invite_code SET used_count = used_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE im_invite_code SET status = 2, update_time = NOW() WHERE deleted = 0 AND valid_end_time IS NOT NULL AND valid_end_time < NOW() AND status != 2
UPDATE im_invite_code SET status = 3, update_time = NOW() WHERE deleted = 0 AND usage_limit IS NOT NULL AND used_count >= usage_limit AND status != 3
